items.title: [Quesnel Cariboo Observer] FOREST OPERATIONS MAPs #3172 – INVITATION TO COMMENT
items.content_html: The public is invited to review and comment on West Fraser’s Forest Operations Maps (FOM) #3172. The FOM shows proposed road construction and cut block development under West Fraser’s Forest Stewardship Plan (FSP) within Forest Development Units in the Quesnel Natural Resource District (DQU) and Tree Farm License 52 (TFL52). These FOMs have a validity period of 3 years beginning June 20, 2026. During the validity period, West Fraser may apply for Cutting Permits containing cut blocks and road permits to construct roads shown on the FOM.
